headline: 2 hours of notes, done in 2 minutes
primary_text:
"I haven't stayed late to finish notes in 6 months. JotPsych gave me my life back." — Sarah K., LCSW

Therapists using JotPsych reclaim an average of 10 hours per week. That's 10 hours not hunched over a laptop. 10 hours back with your family. 10 hours of actual rest.
